calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Successor Trustee To Serve Without Bond And Confirm Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Finch appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

With regard to the September 3, 2013 deed, Mr. Finch referred to the declaration of Gordon Nathan and explained that there was a short time between the date of the loan and the death of the Trustor, and that the loan was designed to make sure the home was fully in the decedent's name. The Petition Confirming Successor Trustee to Serve Without Bond and Confirm Trust Asset was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
